name: @page-context/bridge-extension
description: Page Context Bridge extension for exposing page-aware tools to MCP clients.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @page-context/shared-protocol build && pnpm --filter @page-context/builtin-tools build && pnpm --filter @page-context/tool-visibility build && pnpm --filter @page-context/tool-executor build
scripts.build:chromium: pnpm run build:deps && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=chromium pnpm run build:bundle && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=chromium pnpm run patch:manifest-target && pnpm run patch:sidepanel-build-time
scripts.build:firefox: pnpm run build:deps && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=firefox pnpm run build:bundle && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=firefox pnpm run patch:manifest-target && pnpm run patch:sidepanel-build-time
scripts.build:chromium:target: pnpm run build:deps && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=chromium PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-chromium pnpm run build:bundle && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=chromium PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-chromium pnpm run patch:manifest-target && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-chromium pnpm run patch:sidepanel-build-time
scripts.build:firefox:target: pnpm run build:deps && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=firefox PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox pnpm run build:bundle && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_BROWSER_TARGET=firefox PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox pnpm run patch:manifest-target && PAGE_CONTEXT_EXTENSION_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox pnpm run patch:sidepanel-build-time
scripts.build:targets: pnpm run build:chromium:target && pnpm run build:firefox:target && pnpm run smoke:targets
scripts.test: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --project browser
